title: Puffles
description: A silly mod that adds freaking puffles to your game! Yes, those things from CP
body:
Puffles Mod

This is just a silly mod I made that adds puffles, from Club Penguin, to the game.
You will find these puffles, and the fruit in cold biomes (taiga, snowy taiga, snowy plains). Modded biomes that contain the "is_taiga" tag should also spawn both.

To tame a puffle, you'll need to feed it an "O' berry". Again, you can find these in bushes in cold biomes. You can also use the fruit to plant a bush.
Feeding the puffle will also heal it when hurt and make them freaky allow you to breed them.

You can also use the Puffle Spawn Eggs in creative to spawn a puffle of a specific color. Spawning them through a spawner or command should spawn a puffle of a random color, unless you pass the variant through nbt (key: "variant". type: int). Here's an example if you need it:

``` /summon puffles:puffle ~ ~ ~ {variant:8} ``` ^ This will spawn a black (variant=8) puffle

Here's a list of every variant value:
Variants - Red (0) - Blue (1) - Green (2) - Yellow (3) - Orange (4) - Purple (5) - Brown (6) - Pink (7) - Black (8) - White (9)

Crafting

Spoiler I recently added an item for carrying your puffles more easily! The _Puffle box_. It can be crafted pretty easily too. See below for the recipe.
Puffle box ![Alt text: It requires 4 sticks, 4 planks (any) and a chest. Place the planks in each corner and the cest at the center. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc2bb0fc083475da31ee6ce30b3efed40b8b8c1a.png) Yes, it's just a cardboard box. Don't ask me why

> PS: No, I won't change what happens when you kill a puffle
> PS2: Pls don't
